column1: A single continuous five-second medium close-up at a quiet library desk. A young man faces the camera with an open notebook in front of him. At about 0.3 seconds, he begins speaking and continues clearly until near the end, making one small natural hand gesture. <S>I checked every reference twice, and now the final paragraph is ready to submit.<E> Locked camera, visible face and lips, no cuts or long pauses. <AUDCAP>Foreground: one continuous clear male utterance covering almost the whole clip. Background: very soft room tone and one quiet page movement. No music, no overlapping voices, and no loud impacts.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous five-second medium close-up in a flower shop. A woman faces the camera while gently arranging two stems in a vase. She starts speaking at about 0.3 seconds and continues naturally until near the end. <S>These yellow flowers open slowly, so the arrangement will look even brighter tomorrow.<E> Stable camera, mild hand motion, unobstructed mouth, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Foreground: one continuous clear female utterance. Background: faint paper rustling and a soft vase contact. No music and no other voices.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous five-second full-body shot on a wide indoor corridor. A man walks slowly toward the camera while speaking from about 0.3 seconds until near the end. His face remains visible and his pace stays steady. <S>The meeting room is just ahead, and I have brought all of the updated plans.<E> Smooth backward camera movement, natural walking motion, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Foreground: continuous clear male speech with light natural footsteps. Background: quiet indoor ambience. No music and no overlapping voices.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous five-second medium shot beside a bicycle in a sunny courtyard. A woman turns one handlebar slightly, then looks toward the camera and speaks continuously. <S>I tightened the front brake this morning, and the bicycle feels much safer now.<E> Gentle camera pan of less than fifteen degrees, visible face and hands, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Foreground: one clear female utterance covering most of the clip. Background: a soft metal click and distant birds. No other speech and no music.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous five-second two-person medium shot at a small office table. One man asks a short question, then a woman answers without overlap; both faces remain visible. <S>Did the new schedule arrive? Yes, I printed it and marked the important dates.<E> Locked camera, one clean speaker turn, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Foreground: two clear voices in sequence, first male then female, with no overlap. Background: quiet office room tone and one soft paper movement. No music.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous five-second medium close-up in a workshop. A technician wearing clear safety glasses faces the camera while holding a small wooden part. He speaks continuously and rotates the part once. <S>The edge is smooth now, but I will measure it once more before assembly.<E> Stable camera, controlled hand movement, visible lips, no cuts. <AUDCAP>Foreground: one continuous clear male utterance. Background: low workshop ventilation and one quiet wooden tap. No active power tools, no music, and no other voices.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous five-second wide shot of a small fountain in a stone courtyard at dusk. Water flows steadily while leaves move lightly in the wind; no person appears and there is no speech. Stable locked camera, no cuts, natural continuous motion. <AUDCAP>Foreground: continuous gentle fountain water. Background: soft evening wind and two distant bird calls. No speech, no music, and no sudden loud sound.<ENDAUDCAP>

A single continuous five-second medium shot in a rehearsal room. A seated musician plays four slow, separated notes on an acoustic guitar, then lets the last note decay. The face and both hands remain visible. Stable locked camera, no cuts, natural finger motion. <AUDCAP>Foreground: four clean acoustic guitar notes with clear gaps and a natural final decay. Background: very quiet room tone. No speech, no singing, no percussion, and no other instruments.<ENDAUDCAP>
